title: Dynamic Mould Engineering News Automation
short_desc: An automated Power Platform communication ecosystem compiling and distributing multi-stream technical newsletters with nested data grids to 190+ weekly stakeholders.
blueprint_desc: Engineered a dual-app architecture featuring a Power Apps submission portal for engineering news and a dedicated subscription preference hub for end-users. Built a complex backend Power Automate scheduler that segments news data into 3 distinct content streams, dynamically compiles them into cleanly formatted nested HTML tables, and handles automated weekly distribution while enforcing real-time opt-in/opt-out subscription states.
